title: Demurrage Calculator
subtitle: Estimate demurrage if this shipment is delayed at port
freeDaysHelper: Check your Bill of Lading. Most contracts allow 7–14 free days.
daysHeld: How many days have goods been held?
cargoValueHelper: Optional — used to calculate demurrage as % of cargo value
noChargeableDays: No chargeable days — within free period
pctWarning: Consider whether re-export or destruction may be cheaper.
nextStep: Next step: compare demurrage against alternatives
destructionDesc: Often $500–5,000, depending on port and volume
ratesNote: Rates are indicative based on published port tariffs. Actual rates vary by carrier, season, and contract terms. Confirm final charges with your freight agent.
disclaimer: TapTrao demurrage estimates are based on published port tariff data and are provided for planning purposes only. They do not constitute financial advice.
